requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal studio cyclorama in warm grey-beige. Use adult model with a refined, androgynous look as the only moving person or hand. A simple chrome garment rack. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single, static-camera studio shot in a warm grey-beige cyclorama with a matte concrete floor. At center is a simple chrome garment rack holding an oatmeal beige long trench coat on a wooden hanger. Soft neutral fill light bathes the scene, and a subtle spotlight circle sits on the floor beneath the rack. After a brief beat, an adult model in a black fitted turtleneck and slim black trousers enters smoothly from the right. They lift the trench from the hanger and, in one controlled motion, drape it over their shoulders. As the coat settles, the spotlight gently intensifies and shifts slightly forward so that the coat’s shadow stretches long toward the camera, exaggerating a tall, refined silhouette. The model takes a small step forward. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A single, static-camera studio shot in a warm grey-beige cyclorama with a matte concrete floor. At center is a simple chrome garment rack holding an oatmeal beige long trench coat on a wooden hanger. Soft neutral fill light bathes the scene, and a subtle spotlight circle sits on the floor beneath the rack. After a brief beat, an adult model in a black fitted turtleneck and slim black trousers enters smoothly from the right. They lift the trench from the hanger and, in one controlled motion, drape it over their shoulders. As the coat settles, the spotlight gently intensifies and shifts slightly forward so that the coat’s shadow stretches long toward the camera, exaggerating a tall, refined silhouette. The model takes a small step forward and performs a slow quarter turn, keeping movements minimal and calm. The silk-cotton faille catches a soft sheen as they angle, while the background remains clean and the rack stays in place behind them. The model finishes in a composed pose, slightly angled toward camera, one hand lightly adjusting a lapel, neutral confident expression, with the extended shadow clearly visible on the floor.
requests.overlay_text:
Refined silhouette
Silk-cotton faille
Burberry Foxfield
requests.audio_direction: Modern minimalist fashion beat with a soft low-end pulse; a subtle swell as the spotlight intensifies. No voiceover.
